song.title: Now from My Heart Comes
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D 1) Now from my heart comes, .F#m A happy song; .Bm It’s just for You, Lord, .D7 There’s only One: .G A D Jesus, I love You.
[C] . G A Chorus How I love to sing With my spirit and heart to You. .F#m B Jesus, You’re so rich; In who You are and what You do. .Em A Every time I turn and open up, I drink of You. . D (A) ‘Cause I love you.
[V2] 2) I’ve seen how they, Pierced Your side, You gave Your all, To win Your bride J-E-S-U-S, I love You.
[V3] 3) Without Your love, Lord, I’m so empty Life has no meaning: Just vanity, Jesus, Reality.
[V4] 4) Jesus in me. What a wonder; Bubbling over, Living water. Jesus, What a joy!
